message:
fix: comprehensive mobile layout overhaul

Massive mobile CSS additions without changing desktop appearance.

Layout:
- Container padding: 24px → 16px (12px on iPhone SE)
- Section padding: 96px → 48px
- Card/viz padding: 32px → 20px/16px, border-radius reduced
- Code blocks: smaller font (11.5px), tighter padding
- Console: max-height 200px, smaller font

Typography:
- Hero h1: 1.75rem on mobile
- Section h2: 1.25rem on mobile (1.1rem on iPhone SE)
- Exhibit badges: smaller padding

SVG visualizations:
- Region tree: overflow-x:auto container, min-width:700px SVG
  (horizontally scrollable instead of squished unreadably)
- Cancel state machine: overflow-x:auto wrapper, min-width:650px
- Outcome cards: 2-column grid on mobile, 1-column on iPhone SE

Exhibit-specific:
- Chaos metrics: 3-column grid, smaller numbers (18px vs 24px)
- Benchmark headline: 32px on mobile
- Benchmark detail grid: single column
- Leak detection: 3-column (was 5)
- Replay tables: single column (was side-by-side)
- Sibling isolation: 2-column (was 4)
- WebSocket state: vertical stack
- Recycling heatmap: smaller cells (40px vs 52px)
- Forensics attribution: narrower label column
- Tokio comparison: single column
- REPL textarea: 180px height, 12px font
- Toast: full width on mobile

Performance:
- Glow orbs hidden on mobile (reduce GPU pressure)
- Glow rings use smaller blur radius
- iPhone SE (380px) has extra breakpoint

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
